items.title: Vietnam business insights will refresh from approved sources
items.summary: This section is wired to read generated feed data. The automation should pull public RSS/news sources, summarize SME relevance, and publish approved items here.

items.title: VnExpress International business coverage
items.summary: Use as one public source for Vietnam business and market updates, then add a practical SME interpretation before publishing.

items.title: Vietnam News economy coverage
items.summary: Use for Vietnam economy, investment, trade, and development news that may matter to foreign SMEs.
